name: Printmaxx (Meta Business System)
tagline: 27GB autonomous revenue operating system — 33 agents, 394 scripts, 5,277 scored methods, 395 deployed sites
description: A fully autonomous solopreneur ops system that scrapes intelligence, scores revenue methods on 7 dimensions, generates content, deploys sites, and makes strategic decisions 24/7 via launchd cron. 300+ Python scripts. L0-L6 execution hierarchy. Capital Genesis ranker processes 5,987 methods daily. CEO Agent runs 16-phase cycles. The human does accounts, payments, API keys. The system does everything else.
content_angles: 27GB operating system with 33 autonomous agents running 24/7 via launchd
Capital Genesis: 5,277 revenue methods scored on 7 dimensions with phase-aware weight shifting
395 sites deployed, 132 products built, 191K leads analyzed — all automated
L0-L6 execution hierarchy: CEO Agent orchestrates 16-phase cycles while you sleep
From zero to autonomous revenue infrastructure in 12 months with AI pair programming
$200/mo infrastructure running what would cost a 5-person team $15K+/mo
